title: Glorious 39
overview: A mysterious tale set around a traditional British family on the eve of World War Two. Oblivious to the looming shadow of World War II, the wealthy Keyes maintain a confident façade in the British countryside until daughter Anne becomes an unexpected pawn. Her accidental discovery of secret recordings creates a rift in the family.

trailers.title: LADY KEYES Bande Annonce VF (Drame, 2021) Romola Garai, Bill Nighy, Julie Christie.
